name: Signicast
description: Signicast specializes in investment casting, also known as lost wax casting, which involves creating a wax pattern and coating it with a ceramic slurry to form a mold. With over 150 alloys and advanced facilities, Signicast offers comprehensive casting services, addressing various manufacturing challenges for industries like automotive and medical.

name: General Foundry Service
description: General Foundry Service specializes in high-quality precision aluminum and zinc-aluminum castings, offering lost wax casting as a key manufacturing process. With over 70 years of experience, they provide tailored solutions and emphasize the advantages of investment and lost wax castings for various applications.

name: Zetwerk
description: Zetwerk specializes in manufacturing custom investment cast components, utilizing a wax pattern method to create high-quality parts with intricate designs and tight tolerances. They offer a variety of materials and secondary operations, ensuring precision and durability for applications in sectors like aerospace and medical devices.

name: Shilpan Steelcast Pvt. Ltd.
description: Shilpan Steelcast Pvt. Ltd. is a prominent manufacturer of investment castings, specifically utilizing the lost wax method to produce high-quality steel and alloy steel components. With a significant annual production capacity and a commitment to precision and customization, the company serves various industries globally.

name: Castings P.L.C.
description: Castings P.L.C. is a UK-based manufacturer that specializes in iron casting and machining, offering a range of casting services including design assistance and rapid prototyping. Their expertise in various casting materials and advanced technologies positions them as a reliable partner for casting component needs.

name: Impro Precision Industries
description: Impro is a leading global manufacturer that specializes in precision investment casting, which is a key technique in the lost wax casting process. Their comprehensive solutions encompass various stages of production, ensuring high-quality, complex components for diverse markets such as automotive, aerospace, and medical equipment.

name: CIREX Foundry
description: CIREX is a prominent manufacturer that specializes in investment casting using the lost wax method, producing complex steel components for various industries, including automotive and machine construction. Their high-tech and environmentally friendly casting process ensures that intricate designs can be reliably produced in series.

name: Invest Cast
description: Invest Cast Inc. is a leading manufacturer of investment metal castings, which is directly related to the lost wax casting process, emphasizing their expertise in producing high-quality prototypes and production castings. With advanced technologies like 3D printing, they significantly reduce lead times and offer a wide range of metal alloy options, ensuring precision and quality in their casting solutions.

name: Lianyungang Lida Green Energy Technology Co. Ltd
description: Dongguan Yusheng Metal Products Co., Ltd, a subsidiary of Lida, specializes in lost wax precision parts trading and exporting, highlighting its commitment to high-quality products and technological innovation in the casting industry. With a focus on lost wax casting, the company leverages advanced technology to produce a diverse range of steel castings, positioning itself as a professional manufacturer in this field.

name: Eternal Alloy Cast Pvt Ltd
description: Eternal Alloy Cast Pvt. Ltd. specializes in investment casting of ferrous and non-ferrous metals using the lost wax process, making it highly relevant for those interested in this technique. With over 20 years of experience and a production capacity of 1200 MT per annum, the company offers high-quality castings for various industries.
